name_en: M734 Top-tier Original Dynamic Code Chip Blossom Small Tote. Made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a removable woven leather LV decoration and a perforated LV Circle pattern on the front. Use the handle or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap to switch between hand, elbow, shoulder, and crossbody carrying styles.
name_cn:
M734 Top-tier Original Dynamic Code Chip Blossom Small Tote. Made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a removable woven leather LV decoration and a perforated LV Circle pattern on the front. Use the handle or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap to switch between hand, elbow, shoulder, and crossbody carrying styles.
. x . x .5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Perforated calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Magnetic snap closure
	•	Internal snap hook
	•	Removable zip pocket fixed to strap
	•	Removable LV woven decoration
	•	Metal studs on base
	•	Fits smartphone, compact wallet, keys, earphones, and lipstick
	•	Shoulder strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 5. cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 59. cm
	•	Handle: Double handle
